mapper.sql: id, user_id, record_date, diary_content, mood_status, sleep_hours, diet_note, exercise_note, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO life_record ( user_id, record_date, diary_content, mood_status, sleep_hours, diet_note, exercise_note, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{diaryContent}, #{moodStatus}, #{sleepHours}, #{dietNote}, #{exerciseNote}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM life_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM life_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE life_record SET record_date = #{lifeRecord.recordDate}, diary_content = #{lifeRecord.diaryContent}, mood_status = #{lifeRecord.moodStatus}, sleep_hours = #{lifeRecord.sleepHours}, diet_note = #{lifeRecord.dietNote}, exercise_note = #{lifeRecord.exerciseNote}, updated_at = #{lifeRecord.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{lifeRecord.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0

UPDATE life_record SET record_date = #{lifeRecord.recordDate}, diary_content = #{lifeRecord.diaryContent}, mood_status = #{lifeRecord.moodStatus}, sleep_hours = #{lifeRecord.sleepHours}, diet_note = #{lifeRecord.dietNote}, exercise_note = #{lifeRecord.exerciseNote}, updated_at = #{lifeRecord.updatedAt}, deleted_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{lifeRecord.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 1
